name: Packaging film Bridge ; Building Systems to USLCI
description:
This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the USLCI repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Polyethylene, low-density, LDPE, virgin resin, at plant - RNA"

This is a proxy process because the current USLCI provider is for the polymer itself, not the film

flow.name: Low-density polyethylene packaging film; at plant
flow.category: Technosphere Flows/31-33: Manufacturing/3261: Plastics Product Manufacturing

flow.name: Polyethylene, low-density, LDPE, virgin resin, at plant
flow.category: Technosphere Flows/31-33: Manufacturing/3252: Resin, Synthetic Rubber, and Artificial and Synthetic Fibers and Filaments Manufacturing
